argv:
tell application "iTerm"
set preferredSession to missing value
set groupSession to missing value
repeat with currentWindow in windows
repeat with currentTab in tabs of currentWindow
repeat with candidateSession in sessions of currentTab
if (custom title of candidateSession as text) is "team-beta" and groupSession is missing value then
set groupSession to candidateSession
end if

end repeat
end repeat
end repeat
if preferredSession is not missing value then
set targetSession to preferredSession
else
set targetSession to groupSession
end if
if targetSession is missing value then
set newWindow to (create window with default profile command "'hx' '--job' 'job.json'")
tell current session of newWindow
set custom title to "team-beta"
set name to "hellox-bob-session-2"
return (id as text)
end tell
else
tell targetSession
set newSession to (split horizontal with default profile command "'hx' '--job' 'job.json'")
end tell
tell newSession
set custom title to "team-beta"
set name to "hellox-bob-session-2"
return (id as text)
end tell
end if
end tell

tell application "iTerm"
set sessionIds to {}
repeat with currentWindow in windows
repeat with currentTab in tabs of currentWindow
repeat with candidateSession in sessions of currentTab
if (custom title of candidateSession as text) is "team-beta" then
set end of sessionIds to (id of candidateSession as text)
end if
end repeat
end repeat
end repeat
set AppleScript's text item delimiters to linefeed
return sessionIds as text
end tell
